task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/success/page.tsx

Read card data from sessionStorage instead of URL params.

On mount, read:
const stored = sessionStorage.getItem("kommit_card");
const card = stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : null;

Use card.truth, card.commitment, card.stakeAmount, card.forfeitDestination, card.dueDate to populate the page.
After reading, clear it: sessionStorage.removeItem("kommit_card")

Also get payment_intent from URL searchParams for the save call.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/success/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
Reads from sessionStorage on mount
Clears sessionStorage after reading
Displays all card fields
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: use ast.parse
